name: Carrot Ring with Peas
recipeIngredient: 18 Strips Green Bell Pepper (1/4 inch wide)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook 20 to 25 medium carrots until tender. Drain under cold water and remove skins, then mash.
2. Add sugar, beaten egg yolks, and onion to the mashed carrots. Reserve.
3. Melt 4 tablespoons butter; stir in flour and milk to make a thick sauce. Pour into the carrot mixture and blend thoroughly.
4. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites. Pour batter into a well-buttered ring mold.
5. Place the mold in a pan of hot water and bake at 325°F for about 45 minutes, or until the mold shrinks slightly from the side of the pan.
6. Unmold onto a large plate. Fill the mold with mixed vegetables: sautéed mushrooms (in 4 tablespoons butter) and peas cooked with salt but still bright green.
7. Garnish the outside of the mold with parboiled green pepper strips stood on end.
Serves: 8 to 10
